meta.title: OLAAC — Latin American Accessibility Observatory
meta.description: A social oversight mechanism that independently audits and monitors accessibility compliance in digital and physical environments across Latin America.

hero.title: Working for accessibility in Latin America
hero.description: The Latin American Accessibility Observatory (OLAAC) is a social oversight mechanism that audits and monitors accessibility compliance in digital and physical environments.

whatIs.title: What is OLAAC?
whatIs.diagnosticamosDesc: We conduct independent technical accessibility audits of websites, applications, and physical spaces.
whatIs.informamosDesc: We publish public Accessibility Audit Campaign (AAC) reports to guide development teams.
whatIs.vigilamosDesc: We track compliance with accessibility regulations and public policies at the regional level.

scoresSection.title: Accessibility Dashboard
scoresSection.subtitle: Real-time ranking of Latin American sites audited with Lighthouse
scoresSection.sinDatos: Ranking data is updated automatically every Sunday.
scoresSection.solicitarAuditoria: Request an audit for your site

academia.title: Get trained in digital accessibility
academia.description: Courses designed by accessibility experts. Learn WCAG, evaluation tools, and how to build inclusive digital products. Completing each course earns you a verifiable certificate.

tickets.title: Found an accessibility barrier?
tickets.description: Let the observatory know. Your report helps responsible organizations understand barriers and correct them. All reports are public and receive technical follow-up.

scores.title: Accessibility Scores
scores.description: Independent monitoring of digital accessibility in government and public service sites across Latin America.

violaciones.title: High-impact violations
violaciones.sinViolaciones: No critical or serious violations detected in the last audit.

common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
